programme.title: It'll Be Alright on the Night
programme.desc: Tom Allen uncovers hilarious cock-ups featuring the nation's favourite TV shows and stars - expect behind-the-scenes bloopers from our favourite comedies, dramas and quiz shows alongside live disasters on daytime TV and news. Suffering TV nightmares are Anton Du Beke, Kate Garraway, Rob Rinder, Gethin Jones, Cat Deeley, Ryan Thomas, Bradley Walsh, the cast of McDonald and Dodds and many more, while the cock-ups include Ant and Dec getting into trouble when a pensioner hijacks a live broadcast.

programme.title: The 1% Club
programme.desc: Have you ever wondered how clever you are? This is your chance to find out as comedy legend Lee Mack presents the ultimate leveller of a quiz show where the questions are all about logic and common sense and where the whole family can play together - 100 contestants begin every show, but only some of them will get near the chance to answer a question that only one per cent of the country can get right for up to 100,000 pounds.

programme.title: ITV News
programme.desc: National and international news with reports and analysis from ITV's Correspondents in the UK and around the world. [S,HD]

programme.title: Downton Abbey: A New Era
programme.desc: Romantic drama follow-up film sequel starring Hugh Bonneville and Jim Carter, 2022. The Crawley family go on a grand journey to the south of France to resolve an enigmatic mystery.

programme.title: James Martin's Spanish Adventure
programme.desc: Well-travelled and much-loved chef James Martin gets underneath the skin of Spain - a country he hardly knows but is excited to explore - as he discovers the history and culture of the country's diverse regions through food. It's a road trip like no other that stops at 20 destinations and travels anti-clockwise from San Sebastian to Girona through ever-changing landscapes to seek out key ingredients and sample the fine dining offerings, rustic eateries, and traditional recipes that make Spain one of the most exciting countries in the world for gastronomy. While on his journey, James will be setting up his mobile kitchen against backdrops of stunning scenery and also taking up residency in a gorgeous mountaintop villa as his Spanish 'home from home' kitchen to cook 80 mouth-watering recipes.

programme.title: Ainsley's Fantastic Flavours
programme.desc: North American: Ainsley dives into the tastes and flavours of North America as Ruby Bhogal learns the secrets to the best fried chicken and Sheree Murphy makes a chicken pot pie. [SL,S,HD] S2 Ep2

programme.title: James Martin's French Adventure
programme.desc: James's journey takes him to Pegasus Bridge - famous for the D-Day landings - which he drives across in his beloved 2CV. Normandy is peppered with orchards and dairy farms, famed as cider and calvados country, and is also home to rich and world-famous butter - James sets up his mobile kitchen in one of the many apple orchards in the area, where he prepares a dish of artichokes with hollandaise. James also meets Laurent, who gave up working in a factory to make butter the way his mum taught him, and visits the Le Pave d'Auge restaurant in one of the most beautiful towns in France, where he meets a chef who likes to cook with as much butter as he does and is served a dish of sweetbreads and salsify. James then uses calvados in a pork dish with wet walnuts - All of this inspires two indulgent dishes back home, pain au chocolat using lots of that lovely butter, and black pudding with scallops.

programme.title: Thunderball
programme.desc: The fourth entry in the James Bond film series. Led by one-eyed evil mastermind Emilio Largo, the terrorist group SPECTRE hijacks two warheads from a NATO plane and threatens widespread nuclear destruction to extort 100 million pounds. James Bond is sent to recover the warheads from the heart of Largo's lair in the Bahamas - while facing underwater attacks from sharks and men alike, he must also convince the enchanting Domino, who serves as Largo's mistress, to become a key ally in his mission.

programme.title: ITV News
programme.desc: National and international news with reports and analysis from ITV's Correspondents in the UK and around the world. [S,HD]

programme.title: Love Your Weekend with Alan Titchmarsh
programme.desc: Alan is back and is joined on the farm this time by star of Gavin and Stacey Joanna Page, sports presenter and host of The High Performance Podcast Jake Humphrey dropping by, and India Hicks on the sofa to discuss the fascinating life of her mother Lady Pamela - there is also farmer Tom Davis, who brings along a pair of piglets to hog the limelight, and drinks expert Andy Clarke sharing his favourite tipples inspired by the movies in the Best of British feature to send off the show in style.

programme.title: Prue Leith's Cotswold Kitchen
programme.desc: Prue has invited Ellie Simmonds back for a second visit to her kitchen after the two got on so well the first time - this occasion sees Paralympic gold medallist Ellie bake a coffee and walnut cake which the two enjoy with a cup of tea and a good catch-up. While Prue's food hero is a tea producer from the Vale of Glamorgan who makes loose leave tea and Kombucha tea, she has a versatile dish on the menu - a baked feta, roasted tomatoes and garlic dish which can be used as a starter with bread dipped into it. Prue then adds spinach and cooked pasta, gives it a good mix and serves it as a main course as John heads off to see Hamish Mackie, a local bronze sculptor and good friend who lets John have a go at creating an ornamental elephant. Prue is pleased with herself when a hack for picking up egg yolks goes very well - she's joined in the kitchen by John for chicken ramen and spicy edamame as the two take a trip down memory lane to a holiday in Japan when they tried many types of ramen.

programme.title: Love Your Garden
programme.desc: Alan Titchmarsh, landscape artist David Domoney, and horticulturalists Katie Rushworth and Frances Tophill travel the country to come to the rescue of people who need their help in making the most of their outdoor spaces. Alan and the team transform barren plots and small neglected pieces of ground into stunning gardens and outdoor areas for relaxation while informing and inspiring viewers on how to recreate the looks themselves. Each episode sees Alan surprise garden owners who have an inspiring story to tell and whose outdoor space is in desperate need of a transformation - while the owner is whisked away out of sight, Alan designs the new-look garden by taking inspiration from the best gardens in the area and asking for help from local people and the owner's friends in completing the project.

programme.title: ITV News
programme.desc: National and international news with reports and analysis from ITV's Correspondents in the UK and around the world. [S,HD]

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: When Mahesh Sidana - a butterfly collector and founding member of an elite IQ society - is found murdered after being pinned to a wall in a manner similar to his treasured butterfly specimens, DCI Barnaby and DS Winter are thrust into a crime that impacts not only on their community, but internationally. Can they catch the culprit - with the help of an old friend - before another victim is found?

programme.desc: Nostalgic 60s drama series set in a Yorkshire village. Mike feels responsible when a criminal's wife commits suicide. Blaketon has a narrow escape when he becomes embroiled in Greengrass's latest money-making scheme.

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Comedy-drama series about a curmudgeonly country doctor and his patients in Cornwall. Louisa and Martin have their first therapy session together, but neither of them expects to be given homework - meanwhile, Louisa is surprised when Martin agrees to let schoolboy Peter Cronk do work experience at the surgery, but Morwenna is not quite so happy about it when Peter starts trying to boss her around. Elsewhere, Mrs Tishell is surprised by the return of her husband Clive - and even more so when he tells her he wants to give things another go - Bert has nowhere to live except his new camper van after losing the restaurant, and Louisa has to call Martin to help her when one of her pupils collapses during a school excursion.

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Comedy-drama series about a curmudgeonly country doctor and his patients in Cornwall. When Martin reaches breaking point after being followed around by stray dog Buddy, Louisa and Morwenna persuade him to find a new home for the dog with local vet Angela Sim - however, Martin is not impressed by Angela's alternative approaches to medicine... even if it is of the veterinary kind. Meanwhile, Ruth finds out that Bert has been trying to make his own whisky - but he eventually persuades her to keep his secret - and Louisa and Martin's therapy homework results in a picnic to Martin's dismay... however, even this does not go to plan when they are interrupted by Angela and Buddy on the beach.

programme.title: Law & Order: UK
programme.desc: Murder strikes close to home when a police forensics lab technician is stabbed to death in her home. While Sam and Ronnie pursue their prime suspect, another victim is attacked in what looks to be an identical crime. However, the second victim survives and is able to identify her assailant. Then things get complicated when she and Sam fall for each other. Sam's indiscretion means that what should be a straightforward case for Jake and Alesha becomes anything but. Sam is willing to put his feelings aside for justice, but will it be enough to save his career?

programme.title: Law & Order: UK
programme.desc: Crime drama series about the police who investigate crime, and the Crown Prosecution Service who prosecute the offenders. A suicidal man kills several people when he causes a catastrophic train crash. DS Sam Casey struggles to cope after one of the young victims dies in his arms, forcing new DI Wes Leyton and DS Ronnie Brooks to keep a close eye on him. Jake Thorn is not happy when Henry Sharpe introduces him to Alesha's replacement, but before he has time to protest the team receive some shocking news.

programme.title: A Touch of Frost
programme.desc: The second part of a two-part story which closes the book on this long-running series. The past is catching up with Frost in more ways than one as a series of copycat crimes convinces Superintendent Mullett that his veteran DI's life is in danger - there are now two killers to bring to justice, but that will not happen until tragedy strikes.

programme.title: Endeavour
programme.desc: Crime drama. It's the winter of 1971 - the team are called to investigate the violent and peculiar murder of an Oxford college don, but when Thursday makes an unexpected discovery, Endeavour's suitability to work on the case is compromised and he is sidelined. Meanwhile, things at home become quite tense for Thursday and Win when they receive disturbing news from abroad, and although officially off the clock, Endeavour follows a lead that unravels an intricate plot beyond his wildest imagination. Endeavour finds himself at an abandoned hotel where the body of another fellow bus passenger is found murdered in the same peculiar way as the college don - trapped with a group he can't be sure to trust, Endeavour slowly comes to learn the disturbing truth about those he finds himself amongst. With Endeavour in danger, the buck rests with Thursday to put together the final pieces of the puzzle.

programme.title: The Darling Buds of May
programme.desc: Comedy-drama series based on HE Bates's eccentric Larkin family. The story opens with the arrival of Mr Charlton, a mild-mannered tax inspector who falls in love with Pop's daughter instead of checking Pop's non-existent accounts.

programme.title: The Darling Buds of May
programme.desc: Things don't quite go 'perfick' when Charley decides to play truant from his office at the Inland Revenue and goes strawberry picking with Mariette and the rest of the Larkin family, and it suddenly seems as though Charley's future is in doubt...

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Barnaby and Troy have to solve a double murder when a feisty former socialite and a Casanova are found bludgeoned to death. However, the motives for the murders seem disparate, and there are several people who are suspected of involvement.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: When Joyce Barnaby's new watercolour class takes her to the village green in Midsomer Florey, her project - to paint pictures for a charity auction - is led by the flamboyant Barrett Filby, whose enthusiasm for his pupils' work is infectious if a little misplaced. Other members of the painters' circle include Ann Carter, the no-nonsense houseproud wife of Tony, a menace who is having an affair, Tessa Hawksley, the wife of alcoholic and soon-to-be redundant bank manager Colin, and Ruth Fairfax, a dowdy sixty-something who takes her painting very seriously. Meanwhile, Barnaby and Troy are busy with Operation Pondlife, a scheme to combat street crime in Midsomer County, when Ruth Fairfax's body is found by Joyce and prompts Barnaby and Troy to begin investigating. After learning that Ruth was not who she claimed to be, the investigation is conspicuously taken out of Barnaby's control - due to his wife's involvement as a prime witness - and given to the National Intelligence Squad.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: The death of a young film star at the opening of a Satanic experience at his family's ancestral pile brings Barnaby and Troy to the feuding villages of Upper and Lower Warden - the Smythe-Websters are certainly exploiting the work of celebrated House of Satan author Ellis Bell, but is there more to his legacy?

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: The beautiful, historic watermill in Lower Blissingham is home to award-winning artisan baker Tom Larkton and his pastry chef wife Chrissie. Having fully restored the two-century-old family site into a sustainable, state-of-the-art organic business, the charismatic power couple seem to have it all. Tom’s wildly popular online vlogs have even turned him into a minor celebrity. However, not everyone is raising a glass to their success. The destination's booming popularity has sparked fierce resentment among struggling local business owners, and rumours of an upcoming expansion push tensions to a boiling point. When the envy escalates into deadly sabotage, DCI John Barnaby and DS Jamie Winter are called in to investigate. With livelihoods on the line, the duo must discover who is willing to kill to protect their turf before the bakery's empire completely crumbles.

programme.title: Vera
programme.desc: Detective drama series based on the characters created by Ann Cleeves. As newcomer DC Barry Kelman joins the team, it is not long before the case takes a violent and unexpected turn.

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: Oxford's last surviving all-female college is bidding farewell to one of its most prominent professors - during a reunion of her brightest students, one of the group is found murdered at the bottom of a flight of stairs. Lewis is convinced that the killing is connected to a brutal attack which occurred at the college ten years before - as the investigation progresses, he and Hathaway are drawn ever deeper into the mystery of the college and its secrets.

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Marple
programme.desc: When he becomes the sole witness to a dying man's enigmatic last words, bored Bobby Attfield teams up with beautiful socialite Frankie Derwent and family friend Miss Marple to solve the riddle that the words posed. Bobby's determination to find the truth is strengthened when someone tries to kill him, and the trio realise that a murderer is at large. A trail of clues leads them to Castle Savage and the group manage to charm an invitation to stay there. When they arrive, they soon uncover a hotbed of stifled emotion, treachery, and poisonous deceit. Miss Marple's search reaches into some dark corners as she observes the strange residents of the castle, including the other-worldly Sylvia Savage, her provocative daughter Dorothy, music teacher Roger Bassington, controlling psychiatrist Dr Nicholson, Nicholson's wife Moira and solemn butler Wilson. Marple tries to untangle the riddle and uncovers evidence which points to another murder - can she find the truth before even more people die?

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: When Julian Shepherd is found drowned, it seems as though he died of suicide, because he couldn't access any of his money, which was all tied up in Midsomer Magna millionaire inventor Charles Edmonton's latest invention of a fuel-less transport system. But when another man dies after trying to steal peregrine eggs from the birds of Edmonton's wife, Mallory, at the Edmontons' mansion Casement Hall, Barnaby suspects foul play.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Feature-length drama about a detective whose patch is a seemingly idyllic rural district. programme.desc: Napoleonic War-based action-adventure. France 1813 - the war is entering its final stages and the French formulate a desperate plan to capture Wellington's spymaster Major General Ross. Sharpe is ordered by Wellington to accompany Colonel Brand, who is intent on destroying the French main powder supply in the caves of Rocha - Wellington and Ross are both suspicious of Brand's loyalty, but they do not reveal this to Sharpe. The suspicions are well-founded as Brand secretly meets the French and makes plans for capturing Ross - meanwhile, Sharpe's wife on the home front is showing signs of being bored with Army life and enjoys the attentions of a young poet.

programme.title: Sharpe
programme.desc: Action-adventure series based on best-selling novels by Bernard Cornwell. Sharpe also finds himself abandoned by his wife Jane, who returns to England and meets the handsome Lord Rossendale - now on the run from both the English and the French, Sharpe must find a way to prove his innocence.

programme.title: Jendela Seribu Sungai
programme.desc: Jendela Seribu Sungai adalah sebuah film yang mengisahkan tentang tiga orang anak, yakni Bunga, Kejora & Arian yang tinggal di tepi aliran Sungai Martapura, Banjarmasin. Mereka memiliki cita-cita tersandera oleh keinginan orangtua

programme.title: Ricis The Adventure

programme.title: Dragons
programme.desc: Menceritakan seorang Putra seorang ketua Viking berteman dengan musuh mereka, seekor naga. Kisah ini berfokus pada kejadian terjadi di desa Berk Viking, di mana peternakan penduduk setempat kerap dicuri & diserang oleh seekor naga

programme.title: Little Charmers
programme.desc: Di tanah ajaib Charmville, Charmer-in-training Hazel dan sahabatnya, Posie dan Lavender, masih terbiasa dengan kekuatan mereka. Hazel yang tak kenal takut, memimpin kelompok dalam petualangan yang dirancang kemampuan magis mereka.

programme.title: Menggapai Mimpi
programme.desc: Program features tentang anak - anak sekolah yang berjuang dalam menggapai mimpi. Baik dalam dunia pendidikan formal maupun non formal mereka yang tetap semangat dalam meraih cita - citanya.

programme.title: Dragons 9 Realms
programme.desc: Berlatar 1.300 tahun setelah How to Train Your Dragon, dimana naga telah lama dianggap sebagai legenda. Ceritanya berpusat pada sekelompok remaja yang menemukan celah di Bumi akibat komet yang membuka dunia bawah tanah penuh naga

programme.desc: Bermain & Bergembira bersama anak-anak aktif, cerdas dan kreatif.

programme.desc: Kiko mengisahkan seekor anak ikan mas koki yang sangat mandiri, walaupun dia anak tunggal. Kiko yang selalu riang memiliki 4 sahabat yaitu Lola si ikan diskus, Ting Ting si kepiting, Patino si ikan patin dan Poli si ikan cupang.

programme.title: Cerita Sebelum Tidur
programme.desc: Program pengantar tidur anak yang menghadirkan cerita menarik melalui bayangan tangan. Dengan lampu kecil, bayangan membentuk karakter yang disukai anak-anak.

programme.title: Menggapai Mimpi
programme.desc: Program features tentang anak - anak sekolah yang berjuang dalam menggapai mimpi. Baik dalam dunia pendidikan formal maupun non formal mereka yang tetap semangat dalam meraih cita - citanya.

programme.title: Menggapai Mimpi
programme.desc: Program features tentang anak - anak sekolah yang berjuang dalam menggapai mimpi. Baik dalam dunia pendidikan formal maupun non formal mereka yang tetap semangat dalam meraih cita - citanya.

programme.title: Cerita Sebelum Tidur
programme.desc: Program pengantar tidur anak yang menghadirkan cerita menarik melalui bayangan tangan. Dengan lampu kecil, bayangan membentuk karakter yang disukai anak-anak.

programme.title: Laskar Pelangi 2
programme.desc: Ikal dan Arai menjalani hari-hari menimba ilmu di Sorbonne. Ikal mengambil master ekonomi sementara Arai berkutat dengan ilmu biologi. Di antara harapan ayah Ikal yang menghendaki mereka menjadi ahli pupuk dan apoteker.

programme.title: Sekala
programme.desc: Program Dongeng tentang seribu satu kisah legenda dengan berbagai cerita yang di bawakan oleh teman - teman dongeng.

programme.title: Kiko S3
programme.desc: Mengisahkan tentang keinginan Occi untuk bisa seperti Bulk Boggard yang kuat. Kiko pun berusaha membantu gurita kesayangannya tersebut agar bisa mewujudkan impiannya.

programme.title: Cbeebies
programme.desc: Menghadirkan tayangan favorit Go Jetters & Hey Duggee yang seru dan edukatif dari Cbeebies.Bersama Go Jetters, berpetualang keliling dunia mengenal berbagai tempat ikonik serta pentingnya menjaga lingkungan yang menyenangkan.

programme.title: Main Yuk !
programme.desc: Program yang dirancang untuk membantu anak-anak mempelajari dasar-dasar pengetahuan dan keterampilan melalui visual, gerakan, suara, dan storytelling yang disajikan secara ringan, menyenangkan, edukatif, interaktif & penuh warna.

programme.title: Racing Stars Magazine
programme.desc: Mini Dokumenter tentang perjuangan para Atlet muda dalam mewujudkan impiannya menjadi seorang bintang.

programme.title: Toy
programme.desc: Dolanan merupakan program feature dokumenter yang mengangkat kearifan lokal sebuah desa. Seorang anak akan menceritakan keluarga kecilnya serta kehidupan mereka di tempat tinggalnya.

programme.title: Dragons
programme.desc: Menceritakan seorang Putra seorang ketua Viking berteman dengan musuh mereka, seekor naga. Kisah ini berfokus pada kejadian terjadi di desa Berk Viking, di mana peternakan penduduk setempat kerap dicuri & diserang oleh seekor naga

programme.title: Ricis The Adventure
programme.desc: Ricis bersama timnya menemukan ponsel misterius dan tersedot ke layar ponsel. Ternyata mereka diseret ke portal yang mengirim mereka ke Socidia City, kota metaverse tempat semua aktivitas jejaring sosial di dunia nyata.

programme.title: Hi Kiddos
programme.desc: Hi Kiddos adalah sebuah program edukasi untuk anak yang menyajikan video bertema ilmu pengetahuan dan belajar sambil menjelajahi tempat-tempat menarik.

programme.title: Agent Binky
programme.desc: Serial ini mengikuti petualangan Binky, seekor kucing rumah muda yang hitam dan putih, setelah Dia menjadi kucing luar angkasa, sedang dalam misi untuk melindungi keluarga manusia dari ancaman antar bintang.

programme.title: Abominable And The Invisible City
programme.desc: Serial Animasi yang melanjutkan kisah petualangan Yi Jin dan Peng dari film 'Abominable'. Mereka sekarang harus melindungi makhluk ajaib bernama Everest dan dunia tak kasat mata dari orang orang yang ingin mengeksploitasinya.

programme.title: Grandmother's daughter
programme.desc: Tragedi aneh terjadi di rumah EYANG SRI, bahkan Gendis, cucu Eyang mendapati sebuah teror klenik diluar nalar yang mengancam nyawa mereka.

programme.title: Waktunya Srimulat Bercyanda
programme.desc: Program Sitkom dengan Srimulat, group lawak terbesar dan terpopuler serta memiliki penggemar dari berbagai kalangan masyarakat yang menampilkan kisah-kisah lucu dan sedang menjadi topik hangat

programme.title: Bisik Hati Lara
programme.desc: LARA sebagai anak sulung, tak punya pilihan selain harus mencari pekerjaan tambahan, demi adik satu- satunya, LENA, bisa melanjutkan SMA nya sampai lulus, sembari memastikan terapi pengobatan Ibu.

programme.title: Brata S2
programme.desc: Pembunuhan brutal terjadi di ATM kampung Sukadamai. Roni harus memimpin penyelidikan karena Brata dipindahkan ke bagian arsip. Sukadamai membawa Brata kembali ke mimpi buruk di masa lalu.

programme.title: Angling Dharma S2
programme.desc: Perpecahan terjadi ketika Kerajaan Malwapati yang dipimpin oleh Prabu Angling Dharma disulut oleh perseteruan dengan Syudawirat untuk memperebutkan.

programme.title: Trip Among Rans

programme.title: Negeri 5 Menara

programme.title: Doctor Love Stories

programme.desc: From 2017. Based on the New York Times best-selling book. A heartwarming story about the unlikely hero August "Auggie" Pullman, born with a severe facial deformity.

programme.title: The Wolf of Wall Street
programme.desc: From 2013. The story of the infamous New York stockbroker Jordan Belfort. Belfort went from small stocks and rectitude to IPO stocks and a life of corruption in the late 1980s.

programme.title: The Fighter
programme.desc: From 2010. The talented boxer "Irish" Micky Ward is trained by his unstable half-brother before the welterweight title fight.

programme.title: Once Upon a Time... in Hollywood
programme.desc: From 2019. A faded TV star and his stuntman, strive to achieve fame and success in Hollywood. The year is 1969, the golden age is coming to an end and the Manson sect is wreaking havoc in Los Angeles.

programme.title: The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: From 2010. Milo Boyd, a bounty hunter who has seen better days, lands his dream job when he has to find his ex-wife Nicole Hurly, a journalist who has run away while she is out on bail.

programme.title: American Hustle
programme.desc: From 2013. The brilliant swindler Irving Rosenfeld and his beautiful and cunning partner Sydney Prosser make a living by giving people fake loans.

programme.title: Book Club
programme.desc: From 2018. Four women who have known each other all their lives decide to read "50 shades of Grey". Little did they know what life had to offer after that.

programme.title: A Rainy Day in New York
programme.desc: From 2019. Gatsby and Ashleigh have plans for a romantic weekend for two in New York, but the plan goes awry when they drift apart. Instead, they get to experience fun adventures on their own.

programme.title: A Simple Favor
programme.desc: From 2018. Single mother Stephanie befriends the glamorous, fascinating and mysterious Emily. Suddenly, Emily disappears and Stephanie begins to investigate what has happened.

programme.title: Dear John
programme.desc: From 2010. An idealistic student and a devoted soldier fall in love when he is on permanent duty. The romance develops into a serious relationship over the years, and they try to cultivate love in a troubled time.

programme.title: The Apprentice
programme.desc: From 2024. Donald Trump started his real estate business in 1970s and 80s New York with the help of infamous lawyer Roy Cohn. Determined to step out of his father's shadow, the young Trump met Cohn, who became an important figure in his life.

programme.title: American Made
programme.desc: From 2017. An international adventure based on real events. A smuggler and a pilot are recruited to run the largest cover operation in US history - known as one of the CIA's biggest secrets.

programme.title: Let Him Go
programme.desc: From 2020. A retired sheriff and his wife mourn their dead son and set out to find their only grandchild.

programme.title: Fifty Shades of Grey
programme.desc: From 2015. Ana is an inexperienced college student tasked with interviewing enigmatic billionaire Christian Grey. But what starts out as all business quickly turns into an unconventional romance.

programme.desc: Russell Crowe stars as Robin Hood in Ridley Scott's epic reimagining—fighting corruption and sparking a rebellion that turns a humble outlaw into a timeless symbol of freedom.

programme.title: Robin Hood
programme.desc: Seorang Tentara Salib yang tangguh dalam perang dan komandan Moornya melancarkan pemberontakan yang berani terhadap mahkota Inggris yang korup.

programme.title: War
programme.desc: After his partner Tom Wynne and family are killed by the infamous and elusive assassin Rogue (Jet Li), FBI agent Jack Crawford (Jason Statham) becomes obsessed with revenge as his world unravels into a vortex of guilt and betrayal.

programme.title: War (Rock Action)
programme.desc: Setelah rekannya, Tom, dan keluarganya dibunuh oleh pembunuh terkenal yang sulit ditangkap, agen FBI Jack Crawford menjadi terobsesi dengan balas dendam saat dunianya menjadi pusaran rasa bersalah dan pengkhianatan.

programme.title: Fist Of Legend
programme.desc: In 1937, a Chinese martial artist returns to Shanghai to find his teacher dead and his school harassed by the Japanese.

programme.title: Fist Of Legend
programme.desc: In 1937, a Chinese martial artist returns to Shanghai to find his teacher dead and his school harassed by the Japanese.

programme.title: Fist Of Legend (Rock Action)
programme.desc: Pada tahun 1937, seorang ahli bela diri Tiongkok kembali ke Shanghai dan mendapati gurunya telah meninggal dan sekolahnya diganggu oleh Jepang.

programme.title: Doomsday
programme.desc: In Doomsday, a deadly virus resurfaces decades after quarantine. As chaos erupts, a team enters the walled-off zone to find a cure. Action-packed and gritty, it's a battle for survival.

programme.title: Doomsday
programme.desc: Sebuah film thriller aksi futuristik di mana sebuah tim bekerja untuk mencegah bencana yang mengancam masa depan umat manusia.

programme.title: Tai Chi Master
programme.desc: Two friends, ex Shaolin monks, part ways as they brush with the ongoing rebellion against the government. The ambitious one rises up to be a powerful military commander, while his betrayed friend resorts to learn the calm ways of Tai Chi.

programme.title: Tai Chi Master
programme.desc: Dua sahabat, mantan biksu Shaolin, berpisah saat mereka berhadapan dengan pemberontakan yang sedang berlangsung melawan pemerintah. Yang satu ambisius dan bangkit menjadi komandan militer yang kuat, sementara temannya yang dikhianati mempelajari teknik Tai Chi yang tenang.

programme.title: Total Recall (1990)
programme.desc: In 2084, construction worker Douglas Quaid visits Rekall for a virtual Mars vacation—but the procedure unlocks hidden memories, thrusting him into a deadly rebellion and a secret-agent past.

programme.title: Total Recall
programme.desc: Kehidupan seorang pekerja pabrik, Douglas Quaid, berubah drastis saat ia menjadi buronan setelah mengunjungi Rekall, sebuah perusahaan yang menanamkan memori buatan pada klien-kliennya.

programme.title: Pitch Black
programme.desc: In *Pitch Black*, Vin Diesel stars as Riddick, a dangerous convict stranded on a desert planet with survivors. Facing carnivorous monsters and scorching suns, they must trust each other to survive the deadly night.

programme.title: Pitch Black
programme.desc: Sebuah pesawat penumpang yang mengalami kecelakaan terdampar di sebuah planet yang bermandikan sinar matahari. Namun nyawa para korban selamat mulai terancam ketika monster-monster karnivora muncul saat gerhana.

programme.title: Dante's Peak
programme.desc: Pierce Brosnan stars in Dante's Peak, where a quiet town faces fiery doom from a reawakening volcano. Explosive action and suspense make this disaster thriller a must-see ride!

programme.title: Dante's Peak
programme.desc: Pada tahun 1993, ahli vulkanologi USGS Harry Dalton dan rekannya yang menjadi tunangan Marianne berusaha melarikan diri dari letusan yang sedang berlangsung di Kolombia. Saat mereka keluar, sebuah bom lava menghantam atap truk, membunuh Marianne.

programme.title: Dante's Peak
programme.desc: Pada tahun 1993, ahli vulkanologi USGS Harry Dalton dan rekannya yang menjadi tunangan Marianne berusaha melarikan diri dari letusan yang sedang berlangsung di Kolombia. Saat mereka keluar, sebuah bom lava menghantam atap truk, membunuh Marianne.

programme.title: Twin Dragons
programme.desc: Identical twins – a musician living in New York, and a mechanic living in Hong Kong – are separated in childhood but are unexpectedly reunited years later when the musician travels to Hong Kong for a concert.

programme.title: Twin Dragons
programme.desc: Saudara kembar identik dipisahkan sejak lahir, yang satu menjadi mekanik jalanan, dan yang lainnya menjadi konduktor konser klasik yang ternama. Akhirnya bertemu di usia dewasa, mereka disangka satu sama lain dan terjerat dalam dunia masing-masing.

programme.title: Death Ring
programme.desc: Killers and an ex-Army agent take part in a ruthless millionaire's annual island manhunt.

programme.title: Death Ring
programme.desc: Ketika mantan agen Pasukan Khusus Matt Collins memenangkan kompetisi bertahan hidup, ia menjadi "manusia terkuat di dunia" - sasaran empuk bagi jutawan bejat Danton Vachs, yang perburuan tahunannya menarik para pembunuh paling kejam di dunia.

programme.title: Daylight
programme.desc: Sylvester Stallone stars in Daylight as a fallen hero racing to rescue commuters trapped in a collapsing NYC tunnel. Explosive action and suspense power this high-stakes disaster thriller!

programme.title: Daylight
programme.desc: Bencana di terowongan New York saat ledakan meruntuhkan kedua ujungnya. Seorang pahlawan mencoba membantu orang-orang di dalamnya menemukan jalan keluar.

programme.title: Rambo: First Blood
programme.desc: Academy Award®-Nominee Sylvester Stallone stars in this explosive action-thriller that will keep you on the edge of your seat until the final, powerful frame!

programme.title: Rambo: First Blood
programme.desc: Rambo, seorang veteran Pasukan Khusus Green Beret, berhadapan dengan seorang sheriff di wilayah Pasifik Barat Laut dan Garda Nasional.

programme.desc: Russell Crowe stars as Robin Hood in Ridley Scott's epic reimagining—fighting corruption and sparking a rebellion that turns a humble outlaw into a timeless symbol of freedom.

programme.title: Around The World In 80 Days
programme.desc: It is 1872, and a British inventor, a Chinese thief and a French artist set off to circumnavigate the globe in 80 days. They travel by land, air, sea, and in-line skates in order to beat the clock and finish where they started.

programme.title: Around The World In 80 Days (Rock Action)
programme.desc: Untuk memenangkan taruhan, seorang penemu Inggris yang eksentrik memulai perjalanan, bersama pelayannya dari Tiongkok dan seorang seniman Prancis yang bercita-cita tinggi, dalam perjalanan penuh petualangan dan bahaya keliling dunia tepat dalam waktu 80 hari.

programme.title: Twin Dragons

programme.title: War
programme.desc: Agen India Khalid menjalankan misi untuk memburu dan mengeliminasi mantan mentornya, agen teratas negara tersebut, Kabir, yang telah membelot. Perang mematikan pun dimulai.

programme.title: Robin Hood
programme.desc: Seorang Tentara Salib yang tangguh dalam perang dan komandan Moornya melancarkan pemberontakan yang berani terhadap mahkota Inggris yang korup.

programme.title: Fist Of Legend
programme.desc: Saat belajar di Jepang, Chen Zhen menemukan beberapa pelajar asal Tiongkok menghilang dan tanpa sengaja mengungkap sejumlah konspirasi kelompok Naga Hitam.

programme.title: The Chinese Widow
programme.desc: In 1941, after bombing Tokyo, a US pilot makes an emergency landing in China. A local widow rescues him and risks everything to hide him from Japanese forces.

programme.title: NCIS S22
programme.desc: NCIS searches for a missing undercover agent in the midst of an active hostage situation.

programme.title: NCIS S22
programme.desc: As Vance prepares to host diplomatic talks with Venezuela, the team is called in to investigate the dead body of one of his inside men.

programme.title: Asteroid: Final Impact
programme.desc: Scientist Steve Thomas must risk his reputation, career, and life in order to save mankind from a huge asteroid headed straight for Earth.

programme.title: The Wheel Of Time
programme.desc: A strange noblewoman arrives in a remote mountain village, claiming one of five youths is the reincarnation of an ancient power who once destroyed the world - and will do so again, if she's not able to discover which of them it is. But they all have less time than they think.

programme.title: The Wheel Of Time
programme.desc: Moiraine and Lan lead the four villagers to safety, unsure which is the one from the prophecy. But the friends are equally unsure about their rescuers, especially once they see how far Moiraine is willing to go for her mission - and how far astray Lan is willing to lead them.

programme.title: The Wheel Of Time
programme.desc: Moiraine and Lan find help in an unexpected - and unwanted - quarter, as the separated villagers try to find their way back to each other, or at least to refuge. But they all soon learn how far the Dark One's reach extends, and how few they can trust on the road.

programme.title: The Wheel Of Time
programme.desc: Moiraine struggles with uncertainty while Lan struggles with their new companion. Rand wonders about Mat and Mat starts to wonder at himself. Egwene and Perrin take their first steps down a different path. An incredible new power is unleashed on the world.

programme.title: The Wheel Of Time
programme.desc: Perrin and Egwene run into a familiar face. Mat and Rand see strange ones. Moiraine and Lan mourn their loss.

programme.title: The Wheel Of Time
programme.desc: Moiraine faces the consequences of her actions. Mat faces the darkness in himself. Egwene faces the most powerful woman in the world.

programme.title: The Wheel Of Time
programme.desc: Moiraine and her charges are diverted from their path by an unexpected encounter. This diversion, though, reveals many things — Moiraine's true goal, Lan's past, the fractures that have grown in the group, and the identity of the Dragon Reborn.

programme.title: The Wheel Of Time
programme.desc: For twenty years, Moiraine has dreamed and worked towards this moment. But she can't stop the Dragon Reborn from seeing the appeal of the Dark.

programme.title: The Wheel Of Time S2
programme.desc: Moiraine, Lan, Nynaeve, Egwene, Perrin, and Mat find themselves more alone than ever.

programme.desc: The Two Rivers youths forge new relationships, while Lan tries to mend an old one.

programme.desc: Nynaeve faces her greatest fears. Rand seeks guidance on his powers from an unexpected source.

programme.desc: Moiraine and Rand flee for their lives. Egwene and Nynaeve encounter a new foe.

programme.title: Ruang Publik
programme.desc: Ruang Publik kembali hadir membawa perbincangan yang relevan dan dekat dengan kehidupan masyarakat. Mengupas arah baru pembangunan Kota Surabaya, dari sudut pandang kebijakan hingga harapan warganya

programme.title: Streaming
programme.desc: Mengikuti seorang streamer misteri dengan jumlah pelanggan terbanyak, yang menyiarkan proses mengungkap petunjuk kasus pembunuhan berantai yang belum terpecahkan secara langsung.

programme.title: Rolling
programme.desc: Juri yang depresi terjebak di rumah selama penyebaran Covid. Saat ibunya pergi mengunjungi sang nenek, ia harus menjalankan restoran Kimbap sampai ibunya kembali.

programme.title: The Woman In The White Car
programme.desc: Setelah penusukan, Do Kyung membawa saudara perempuannya yang tak sadarkan diri ke rumah sakit. Penyelidikan polisi mengungkap identitas palsu dan hubungan mengejutkan.

programme.title: Single In Seoul
programme.desc: Yeong-Ho adalah seorang pemengaruh terkenal yang mengagungkan kehidupan lajang. Hyeon-Jin adalah seorang editor yang sangat ingin menemukan pasangan. Keduanya bertemu saat bekerja bersama untuk sebuah buku.

programme.title: Canola
programme.desc: Seorang siswi SMA bertemu kembali dengan neneknya secara dramatis setelah hilang selama 12 tahun.

programme.title: The Ugly
programme.desc: Im Dong-hwan menemukan jasad ibunya yang hilang setelah empat puluh tahun. Bertekad untuk menemukan kebenaran di balik hilangnya ibunya, ia memulai perjalanan yang mengerikan untuk mengungkap rahasia kelam keluarganya.

programme.title: The Ugly
programme.desc: Im Dong-hwan menemukan jasad ibunya yang hilang setelah empat puluh tahun. Bertekad untuk menemukan kebenaran di balik hilangnya ibunya, ia memulai perjalanan yang mengerikan untuk mengungkap rahasia kelam keluarganya.

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Seorang penagih utang menderita kanker hati dan harus mendapatkan transplantasi hati dalam sepuluh hari. Seorang penipu bersedia mendonorkan hatinya jika ia bisa melacak pria yang memasukkannya ke dalam penjara.

programme.title: Life Is Beautiful
programme.desc: Se-yeon, yang mengabdikan seluruh hidupnya untuk keluarganya, tiba-tiba menderita penyakit yang sangat parah. Kini, ia bertekad untuk menjalani hidup dengan baik dan mencari cinta pertamanya dengan bantuan suaminya.

programme.title: Honest Candidate 2
programme.desc: Joo Sang-sook, yang gagal memenangkan pemilihan walikota Seoul dengan mengungkap kebenaran di tv nasional, secara tiba-tiba menjadi sorotan setelah menyelamatkan seorang pemuda yang tenggelam.

programme.title: The Witch: The Other One (tvN Movies)
programme.desc: Setelah melarikan diri dari laboratorium terpencil, seorang gadis muda dengan kekuatan luar biasa mendapati dirinya dalam pelarian dari beberapa organisasi misterius, mencari perlindungan dengan seorang wanita dan adik laki-lakinya.

programme.title: Hitman 2
programme.desc: Setelah musim pertama yang sukses, Webtoon "Agent Jun" akan memulai musim keduanya.

programme.title: Love Reset (tvN Movies)
programme.desc: Sepasang suami istri yang menerima penyelesaian perceraian kehilangan ingatan mereka karena sebuah kecelakaan. Mereka jatuh cinta lagi, sehingga keluarga mereka berusaha mengembalikan ingatan mereka untuk menyelesaikan perceraian.

programme.title: The Killer (tvN Movies)
programme.desc: Seorang mantan pembunuh bayaran setuju untuk menjaga seorang gadis remaja, tetapi ketika gadis itu terlibat dengan orang-orang yang tidak baik, dia harus menyelamatkannya.

programme.title: The Night Owl
programme.desc: Seorang tunanetra yang merupakan ahli akupunktur secara ajaib mampu melihat secara normal di malam hari, dan ia tidak sengaja menyaksikan kematian putra mahkota.

programme.title: Usury Academy
programme.desc: Aksi akademi di mana anak laki-laki dengan peringkat terendah, yang hidup tanpa mimpi atau harapan, merebut kekuatan uang tanpa ragu-ragu dan berlari dengan kecepatan penuh.

programme.title: Project Wolf Hunting
programme.desc: Selama ekstradisi ke Korea, sekelompok penjahat nan berbahaya berkumpul untuk melarikan diri dari sebuah penjara terapung.

programme.title: Secret: Untold Melody
programme.desc: Kisah seorang pianis yang kariernya terhenti karena cedera. Di sekolah musik di Korea, ia jatuh cinta pada seorang wanita misterius yang menginspirasinya untuk menekuni musik lagi, mengungkap rahasia yang dapat membelokkan waktu.

programme.title: The Killer
programme.desc: Seorang pembunuh yang kecewa menerima satu serangan terakhir dengan harapan dapat menggunakan penghasilannya untuk mengembalikan penglihatan seorang penyanyi yang secara tidak sengaja dibutakannya.

programme.title: Emergency Declaration (tvN Movies)

programme.title: Stunt Heroes
programme.desc: Rollovers, ramp jumps, crashes – there are 1000 ways to destroy cars. They all know the Stunt Heroes! The report looks back at the car highlights of the last few months. (Station info).

programme.title: Top Speed Classic
programme.desc: Top speed presenter Martin Utberg and his teammate Jonas Lach are taking part in the Planai Classic, one of the few remaining real winter rallies in Europe. You start with an Austin Seven from 1932. (Station info).

programme.title: Super Cars
programme.desc: English luxury and German lifestyle. With an extended wheelbase, the Bentley Bentayga focuses on its rear passengers and pampers them with flawless workmanship and a champagne cooler. In the Mercedes CLE 53, however, the best place is behind the steering wheel. Mercedes wants to arouse emotions again with a 3-liter in-line six-cylinder engine. (Station info).

programme.title: Motorcycles
programme.desc: Carbon fiber on motorcycles – does that make sense? Carbon: The fabric structure of the magical material from Formula 1 shimmers with high quality. Highly priced, but ultra stable and ultra light and therefore extremely attractive for racing and street motorcycles. (Station info).

programme.title: Mission Mobility
programme.desc: Fascination Australia. Red deserts, mystical sounds and endless expanses. Traveling through the outback by car has always been the dream of 25-year-old student Lena Kwasow. She is a passionate driver and self-confessed Mini fan and wants to drive across the Northern Territory for 10 days. From Alice Springs to Ayers Rock in a Mini over almost 500 km of dusty roads, Lena will encounter fascinating wildlife and breathtaking nature. (Station info).

programme.title: NTT Indycar Series 2026
programme.sub-title: Chevrolet Detroit GP, Streets of Detroit, Michigan

programme.title: Made in....
programme.desc: Maybach – the finest car manufacturer from Germany. Each model is made entirely by hand. An outstanding vehicle, the absolute pinnacle of driving comfort, timeless aesthetics and workmanship. A Maybach is considered the measure of all things modern automotive technology. These vehicles were forgotten for over 60 years - until Mercedes-Benz revived the luxury brand in 2002. (Station info).

programme.title: Green wave
programme.desc: Over 500 hp, but no CO2 emissions or fuel consumption? The reality of virtual design -- A new type of battery promises to revolutionize electromobility. -- The cars of the future will steer and react independently: autonomous driving. (Station info).

programme.title: Dream Cars
programme.desc: Whether Jaguar, Rolls Royce or Bentley, Aston Martin or McLaren, Dream Cars - England shows the most exciting, beautiful and fastest dream cars from Great Britain. Whether luxury sedan, coupe or super sports car, the cars from England combine tradition with exclusive luxury, exceptional performance and unique British flair. (Station info).

programme.title: Crash
programme.desc: When ambition exceeds driving ability and when well-secured racing professionals are carried out of the curve, then we are there with the camera. Breathtaking stunts of professional drivers and slapsticks of sophisticated tin bullets. Spectacular scenes in which no one is harmed. (Station info).

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.sub-title: The sporting legacy of Henry Ford
programme.desc: Henry Ford would have been 150 years old in 2013. The successful American entrepreneur became known for introducing the assembly line in automobile production. In this program, Classic Ride deals with three models that can certainly be described as an important part of its sporting heritage: Ford Thunderbird (1955), Ford Mustang (1964) and Ford Capri (1968). (Station info).

programme.title: Cars + Life
programme.desc: With high-quality vehicles and a focus on hybrid and electric drives, Volvo offshoot Polestar is developing into a serious competitor to Tesla. Also: Hyundai is taking a different approach with the Nexo and is devoting itself to fuel cell technology. And: the Volkswagen Golf GTE and two other VW hybrid models in comparison. (Station info).

programme.title: Car History
programme.desc: Racing has been Ford's engine for over 100 years: Henry Ford won his first race with his first car. Thousands more victories are to follow as Ford writes motorsport history: the GT40 in Le Mans, the Capri on the circuit and the Escort in the Monte Carlos Rally and the Safari Rally. Ford professionalizes rallying, wins the Indianapolis 500 and builds the most successful engine in Formula 1, the Ford-Cosworth. Steering wheel geniuses like Jim Clark, Jackie Stewart and Carlos Sainz sit in the cockpit. Car History shows Ford's entire motorsport history, with exciting pictures from the wild (channel info).

programme.title: Nordschleife
programme.desc: And only here does the largest motorsport spectacle in the world take place. 210 racing cars, more than 1,000 drivers and helpers, plus over 200,000 fans. The 24 hour race leaves no one indifferent. (Station info).

programme.title: On Tour
programme.desc: A very special race takes place in Saalbach Hinterglemm: The Snow Mobile Grand Prix. No expense or effort is spared at the big winter opening of the Alps. 15,000 cubic meters of snow are carted in to transform the Austrian town into a white race track for the fifth time. Here, professionals and celebrities engage in a snow battle that is second to none. (Station info).

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: Machine versus nature. A bit of madness is part of it when off-road enthusiasts drive breakneck maneuvers in the toughest off-road trophies with 800 HP monsters. They bite the hard stone. These include the most robust vehicles. We look off the roads and find some top off-roaders. (Station info).

programme.title: Rear view mirror
programme.desc: 40 years of Mercedes tuning: AMG CLK 63 Black Edition. Total Siberia: 7100 km, and 33 teams in the Transsyberia Rally. Audi RS 4 and Porsche 911 4S: upper class of corner robbers. The VW Tiguan in the off-road test. Hummer H3 vs Toyota FJ Cruiser: Two off-roaders in comparison. Subaru Impreza WRX and Mitsubishi Lancer EVO 9 in comparison (transmitter information).

programme.title: Tuning – it doesn’t get any lower than that!
programme.desc: Premium tuners and factory tuners: More and more horsepower, better and better sound, ever lower chassis, there are no limits. The finest tuning has to offer. Tips and tricks for lowering, repairing and pimping up. (Station info).

programme.title: Stunt Heroes
programme.desc: Martial arts specialist Ramazan develops a fight choreography in which four stuntmen dressed as agents beat him up. This episode of “Stunt Heroes” answers whether he can free himself from the tricky situation and who will end up flying off spectacularly in the car. (Station info).

programme.title: Top Speed Classic
programme.desc: Moderator Martin Utberg was invited by managing director Sven Bössow to take part in the opening of the winter festival at the Hans-Peter Porsche Traumwerk in Anger and takes the audience on a journey through time through this extraordinary museum. In this episode, Hans-Peter Porsche, grandson of Ferdinand Porsche, talks about how his dream came about. (Station info).

programme.title: Super Cars
programme.desc: It is the vision of an electric future from AMG: The Concept AMG GT XX delivers an incredible 1360 hp and charges faster than you can say range anxiety. We were there for the spectacular world premiere. And: This racer looks like it came out of a retro film but is the brand new top model from Morgan. We reveal five exciting facts about this British work of art. (Station info).

programme.title: Road Wars Staffel 6
programme.desc: Drug crime, house searches, chases: Roadwars accompanies a special unit of the British police. Together with the dog team, they declare war on the thieves in the Thamse Vally. (Station info).

programme.title: Classic Races
programme.desc: Today in Classic Races we are showing what is probably the best description and representation of the four-wheel drive system newly developed by Audi from 1980 onwards. With fascinating and exciting images from various rallies, legendary drivers and great scenes from the rally world. (Station info).

programme.title: Car History
programme.desc: Mercedes-Benz is the most successful automobile brand in motorsport. From the world's first car race in 1894 to today's Formula 1, Mercedes has been winning races all over the world for over 120 years. Whether Panamericana or Le Mans, DTM or Indianapolis, Silver Arrows or Formula 1, no other manufacturer has won as many races as Mercedes. The Mercedes racing drivers are always the greatest and most famous drivers of their time like Rudolf Carracciola, Juan Manuel Fangio or Lewis Hamilton. (Station info).

programme.title: Classic
programme.desc: Classic cars and everything that goes with them: events, racing, portraits, mechanic tips and the most beautiful pictures from the automobile archives from all over the world. The most beautiful oldies, the hottest racing cars from bygone eras. (Station info).

programme.title: Rear view mirror
programme.desc: The highlights from all eras of automobile history: When the brand new Mercedes A-Class fell over in the moose test, when Stirling Moss won the Mille Miglia in record time, when Ferdinand Porsche amazed the world with an electric car in 1900. Exciting images show the viewer what really happened. Contemporary witnesses report on their experiences. The Audi quattro, also called Urquattro, is a sports coupe from the Audi brand that was manufactured for a good ten years starting in 1980. The Urquattro is part of the success story of Audi's quattro drive in sports and road vehicles. Reporter Maximilian Engert presents the vehicle. (Station info).

programme.title: Top Speed Classic
programme.desc: Top Speed ​​is all about classic automobiles. Moderator Martin Utberg actively takes part in the most beautiful classic car events in the world. Here you not only see old cars, but also experience the whole history of the classic jewels and their owners. (Station info).

programme.title: Car History
programme.desc: In the seventies and eighties, automobile production boomed and with it automobile advertising. Television advertising for cars is gaining momentum. Even the oil crisis cannot stop global automobile production or car advertising. The spots are becoming more and more imaginative and entertaining. Ultimately, automobile advertising is developing into its own cinematic medium, produced at a high quality and expensively. (Station info).

programme.title: Top Speed Classic
programme.desc: Moderator Martin Utberg takes the audience to the Klassikwelt Bodensee in Friedrichshafen, an event that is much more than a classic car fair. In addition to vintage and youngtimers, visitors can expect a varied program with demonstration drives of historic racing cars, an air show, a historic paddock and numerous encounters with collectors, racing drivers and enthusiasts. Top Speed ​​discovers why the Klassikwelt Bodensee is one of the most diverse classical events in Europe. (Station info).

programme.title: NTT Indycar Series 2026
programme.sub-title: Chevrolet Detroit GP, Streets of Detroit, Michigan

programme.title: Icelandic Formula Off-Road
programme.desc: Formula Off Road was invented in Iceland. Hoping to raise more money for the Icelandic rescue teams, the teams began showing their 4WD cars in action in the Icelandic hills. (Station info).

programme.title: BTRDA Rallycross 2025
programme.desc: The double-header of the 2022 BTRDA Clubmans Rallycross Championship at the Pembrey Circuit in Wales enters the second round. Numerous classes, vehicles and drivers are ready to fight for important points for the overall standings in the third round of the championship. (Station info).

programme.title: Going Pro 2026
programme.desc: The seventh season of the Going Pro TV series follows Damon Surzyshyn and the entire PROsport Racing team in the 2026 ADAC GT4 Germany season (channel information).

programme.title: FastZone 2026
programme.desc: The show takes the audience into the fascinating world of international racing. The format combines thrilling motorsport action with in-depth analysis and provides a comprehensive overview of important racing series around the globe. In addition to spectacular scenes on the track, the format offers exciting background reports, technical insights and stories about drivers, teams and their challenges. This creates a diverse look at speed, competition and the passion that drives motorsport worldwide. (Station info).

programme.title: Super Cars
programme.desc: Compact high-performance models have a long-standing tradition at BMW. From the 2002 turbo to the 1 Series M Coupe to the current M2. We take a closer look at the second generation and test the drifting potential, racing and everyday qualities of the M2. What does he do best? We also look at its history and development and take a look at its competitors. (Station info).

programme.title: 4x4 – Das Allrad Magazin
programme.desc: Sand, scree, water or asphalt Adventures can be had on any surface if you have the right vehicle. The Can-Am Outlander and Maverick R are the ultimate fun machines for off-road driving fun. We put them to the test in Portugal. And this is supposed to be a Smart? Yes, actually #5 turns everything we thought we knew about the popular kissing ball upside down. (Station info).

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: Robust and popular - these are the keywords for these models. Subaru has renamed the XV. Completely renovated and with the new name Cros-strek, the SUV is now looking for customers. We reveal what's behind it. And Cupra is giving its bestseller Formentor an update that is particularly causing a visual sensation. We explain why. (Station info).

programme.title: Biker Lifestyle
programme.desc: The north of Thailand is a popular travel destination, not just for adventurous individual tourists. The north is known for its mountainous, densely forested areas and therefore this region is also a paradise for motorcyclists. Thousands of curves on well-developed roads with little traffic and a diversity of culture and landscape make this region a perfect holiday destination for us to escape the winter in Germany for the fourth time. We will take you on a 1600 km long motorcycle tour to the most beautiful places in northern Thailand. (Station info).

programme.title: NZ Jetsprint Championship 2025
programme.desc: The New Zealand Jetsprint Championship is the most important sprint boat competition from New Zealand, the country where the sport was founded in 1981. Jetsprinting is comparable to rally sports, but there is only one boat on the track at any given time and boats drive at very high speeds. The up to 500 HP strong jet sprint boats therefore try to achieve the best time on the tracks. (Senderinfo).

programme.title: Isle of Man Tourist Trophy 2025
programme.desc: Would Superstock racing become a blueprint for Superbike racing? With another dominant performance from Hicky? The experts didn't really agree on this. A race full of surprises and an interesting podium. (Station info).

programme.title: FIM Supermoto World and European Championship 2025
Icelandic Formula Off-Road
programme.desc: Formula Off Road was invented in Iceland. Hoping to raise more money for the Icelandic rescue teams, the teams began showing their 4WD cars in action in the Icelandic hills. (Station info).

programme.title: US Pro Pulling 2023
programme.desc: Motorsport like you've never seen it before. In this competition, drivers use multi-engine, modified tractors to pull a heavy sled around the track. Some tractors can even produce more than 12,000 horsepower. This makes tractor pulling the strongest motorsport in the world. (Station info).

programme.title: Isle of Man Tourist Trophy
programme.desc: With the first Supersport race shortened to 3 laps, the question was whether Hicky could once again demonstrate his dominance from the Superbike race, whether Lee Johnston could repeat his success from last year or whether Michael Dunlup would live up to his role as favorite here. It was a hot fight! (Station info).

programme.title: Tour European Rally 2026
programme.desc: The Tour European Rally 2023 traditionally starts with the promo event in Finland. The 58th edition of the spectacular Arctic Lapland Rally offers pure action and excitement on the snow and ice slopes of Finland. (Station info).

programme.title: Top Speed Classic
programme.desc: Moderator Martin Utberg takes part in the Wilder Kaiser Classic vintage car rally. 122 classic vehicles set off from Ellmau in Tyrol on a two-day tour in which fantastic views, impressive mountain passes and special stages play the main role. In this episode, Martin also speaks with racing legend Hans-Joachim Stuck, who is connected to the event as an ambassador. And as always, these conversations are not only interesting, but often wonderfully humorous. (Station info).

programme.title: Car History
programme.desc: Mercedes-Benz is the most successful automobile brand in motorsport. From the world's first car race in 1894 to today's Formula 1, Mercedes has been winning races all over the world for over 120 years. Whether Panamericana or Le Mans, DTM or Indianapolis, Silver Arrows or Formula 1, no other manufacturer has won as many races as Mercedes. The Mercedes racing drivers are always the greatest and most famous drivers of their time like Rudolf Carracciola, Juan Manuel Fangio or Lewis Hamilton. (Station info).

programme.title: Top Speed Classic
programme.desc: In this episode, Eric van Lammeren tells the special story behind the recreation of the Bugatti Type 41 Royale prototype, which Ettore Bugatti used as a private vehicle for five years and which was considered lost for a long time after a crash. In the SML CarGroup showroom, Eric speaks to an audience with Thomas Hientz and presenter Martin Utberg about the background and fascination of this extraordinary project. Martin and Thomas are also traveling in a very special Mercedes-AMG PureSpeed. (Station info).

programme.title: Racing Files
programme.sub-title: McLaren – from Formula 1 to Can Am
programme.desc: McLaren is the second oldest active team in Formula 1 and now enjoys worldwide fame. However, when it was founded, hardly anyone would have expected that the team founded by New Zealand racing driver Bruce McLaren would develop into a heavyweight in the world of super sports cars and one of the best-known teams in motorsport. Racing Files tells the story of McLaren. (Station info).

programme.title: A&E
programme.desc: The West Midlands Ambulance Service is called to millions of emergencies every year. The operations are often so intense that treatment begins on the street. The team of dedicated doctors and paramedics has the daily task of saving lives. (Station info).

programme.title: NTT Indycar Series 2026
programme.sub-title: Sonsio GP, Indianapolis Motor Speedway Road Course, Indiana

programme.title: FastZone 2026
programme.desc: The show takes the audience into the fascinating world of international racing. The format combines thrilling motorsport action with in-depth analysis and provides a comprehensive overview of important racing series around the globe. In addition to spectacular scenes on the track, the format offers exciting background reports, technical insights and stories about drivers, teams and their challenges. This creates a diverse look at speed, competition and the passion that drives motorsport worldwide. (Station info).

programme.title: A&E
programme.desc: The West Midlands Ambulance Service is called to millions of emergencies every year. The operations are often so intense that treatment begins on the street. The team of dedicated doctors and paramedics has the daily task of saving lives. (Station info).

programme.title: Motorcycles
programme.desc: This time in Motorcycles: Motorcycling Made in England. Of course, THE British cult brand par excellence should not be missing, Triumph. We test the Tiger 800 and the Tiger 1050. With it, the English offer an absolute fun bike that is more competitive than ever with its typical triple and tight setup. And to get to the bottom of the British way of driving, Scotland is the destination of a motorcycle tour: to the Highlands with a BMW R 1200 RT. (Station info).

programme.title: Mission Mobility
programme.desc: Benjamin Ketterl is one of 58 emergency drivers in the Munich area. The Yellow Angel is mostly on the move in the city, but highway patrols are also part of the roster. (Station info).

programme.title: NTT Indycar Series 2026
programme.sub-title: Bommarito Automotive Group 500, WW Technology Raceway, Illinois

programme.title: Made in....
programme.desc: Men's dreams are born in Bottrop. If you are looking for exclusivity and find the performance of a Mercedes AMG to be too low, you have come to the right place: The Brabus company is one of the best-known tuners in the world. Motorvision shows what makes a Brabus so unique. (Station info).

programme.title: Green wave
programme.sub-title: Sustainability in mobility 1: Optimized combustion engines
programme.desc: Combustion engines have ensured our progress for 125 years. With the price of harmful emissions. In addition, the world population continues to grow and more and more cars are being sold. But this will only work for our earth/environment in the long term if vehicle emissions are drastically reduced at the same time. Green Wave – Sustainability in mobility shows developments as to how manufacturers want to further reduce the consumption of their vehicles in the future. (Station info).

programme.title: Dream Cars
programme.desc: Whether Mercedes S-Class, BMW 7 Series or Audi A8, German sedans enjoy a worldwide reputation. They are famous for their perfection and prestige. Limousines Made in Germany are the epitome of status and they set the standards in terms of comfort, pioneering technology and safety systems. DreamCars presents the most famous, beautiful and luxurious German limousines. (Station info).

programme.title: Crash
programme.desc: When ambition exceeds driving ability and when well-secured racing professionals are carried out of the curve, then we are there with the camera. Breathtaking stunts of professional drivers and slapsticks of sophisticated tin bullets. Spectacular scenes in which no one is harmed. (Station info).

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.desc: The creators of the Apollo 3500 GT wanted to camouflage and deceive. The appearance of the sleek two-seater, which was released in 1962, is pure Italy, from the chrome spoke wheels, the leather-lined interior to the Pininfarina-style body. The Apollo's creators and technology come from the USA. There's a V8 engine from Buick under the long hood for good reason. The cheap technology should make the GT 3500 affordable on the American market. Nevertheless, the project was not a great success. Only just under 100 pieces were made. Today the Apollo 3500 GT is rarer than many classic Ferraris. (Station info).

programme.title: Cars + Life
programme.desc: Fuel of the future? Hydrogen and wind power? Hamburg Airport is experimenting with the climate-neutral production of kerosene. Also: six generations of Porsche 911 Turbo at the Hockenheimring with ex-rally world champion Walter Röhrl. And: the Aston Martin DBS Superleggera super sports car in the driving report and the Q2, Audi's smallest SUV, in the test. (Station info).

programme.title: Car History
programme.desc: A M G: Always the epitome of top automotive performance, exclusivity and dynamic driving fun. (Station info).

programme.title: Nordschleife
programme.desc: Racing legend Jackie Stewart once described the Nordschleife of the Nürburgring as a multi-limbed monster and gave it the name “Green Hell”. The legendary track is also regularly accessible to the general public. Many “racers at heart” race through Schwedenkreuz, Fuchsrohre, Kesselchen and Karussell in their private cars. Once through the “Green Hell” – a dream for many that no one has to stay. Nordschleife fans take the spectators on board and tell them what they associate with the ring. (Station info).

programme.title: On Tour
programme.desc: Today from the Supercross Cup in Munich. With the best drivers from all over the world traveling to take home the crown - who will be King of Munich? We don't know it yet, but in a few minutes we'll be a little wiser - the highlight of the indoor motorsport scene this season. (Station info).

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: The Geneva International Motor Show is traditionally the first European car show of the year and is one of the 5 most important car shows in the world! New generations, top models, vehicles with electric or alternative drives, manufacturers of almost all car brands show new products and cars that you will see on the streets tomorrow. Perfect Ride shows the highlights. (Station info).

programme.title: Rear view mirror
programme.desc: 40 years of Mercedes tuning: AMG CLK 63 Black Edition. Total Siberia: 7100 km, and 33 teams in the Transsyberia Rally. Audi RS 4 and Porsche 911 4S: upper class of corner robbers. The VW Tiguan in the off-road test. Hummer H3 vs Toyota FJ Cruiser: Two off-roaders in comparison. Subaru Impreza WRX and Mitsubishi Lancer EVO 9 in comparison (transmitter information).

programme.title: Tuning – it doesn’t get any lower than that!
programme.desc: Premium tuners and factory tuners: More and more horsepower, better and better sound, ever lower chassis, there are no limits. The finest tuning has to offer. Tips and tricks for lowering, repairing and pimping up. We show you what you can do and how to do it. The German Race Wars invite you to sprint over the quarter mile. Fast cars, smoking tires and full throttle at the starting lights. (Station info).

programme.title: Stunt Heroes
programme.desc: The stuntheroes from Action Concept are tough professionals. They throw themselves off houses, cause cars to fly or explode. Without the necessary seriousness and constant concentration when carrying out your work, nothing works. We sent our reporter Dean Malay to Action Concept to get to know the people, the characters behind the hard shell. Stunt coordinator Domi shows Dean the work processes at Action Concept, but also explains why the stuntman is called Tobi, Heidi. (Station info).

programme.title: Top Speed Classic
programme.desc: In these episodes we look back at highlights from great events, Martin Utberg conducts interviews with guests and organizers via Skype. This time Classica Ice Marathon, Planai Classic and Black Forest Winter Challenge. (Station info).

programme.title: Super Cars
programme.desc: From racetrack legends to sporty luxury road cruisers: no automobile manufacturer manages the balancing act between driving pleasure and comfort as well as BMW. With 550 hp and lightweight construction, the M4 CSL is a race track icon. We test it and show its story. What does the BMW M760e stand for? The power says driver's sedan! The luxurious furnishings speak for danger. We'll find out. (Station info).

programme.title: Tour European Rally 2026
programme.desc: The Tour European Rally 2023 traditionally starts with the promo event in Finland. The 58th edition of the spectacular Arctic Lapland Rally offers pure action and excitement on the snow and ice slopes of Finland. (Station info).

programme.title: Isle of Man Tourist Trophy 2026
programme.desc: It was actually supposed to be the final day, but in the end only the super athletes and sidecars started, while the senior was postponed to the next day. However, history was written once again in the extremely competitive second super sports race. (Station info).

The fact that the number of deaths in motorcycle accidents in Germany is falling is due, among other things, to the constant improvement of crash helmets. The helmet manufacturer Schuberth in Magdeburg plays a large part in these life-saving developments. Around 350 employees manufacture all kinds of protective helmets here.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.desc: S2 E14 — Bizzarrini GT 5300The Bizzarrini GT 5300 from 1965 was supposed to heat up the Ferraris on the racetrack. Giotto Bizzarrini wanted to use this car to return the favor to his former employer Enzo Ferrari, because the employment relationship ended in a dispute.

programme.title: Cars + Life
programme.desc: E22 — Episode 22The show presents the latest trends and innovations from the automotive industry.

programme.title: Car History
programme.desc: S2 — Mercedes - The comeback of the Silver Arrows This episode is about the return of the Silver Arrows to racing.

programme.title: Nordschleife
programme.desc: S1 E22 — Tourists in the Green Hell 22 Racing legend Jackie Stewart once described the Nordschleife of the Nürburgring as a multi-limbed monster and gave it the name Green Hell.

programme.title: On Tour
programme.desc: Night of the JumpsMiriam Höller berichtet von der Night of the Jumps in der Münchner Olympiahalle.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: S1 E17 — Open-Air DrivingThe convertible models Cascada and Adam from Opel are tested as well as the 3-Series BMW Gran Turismo.

programme.title: Rear view mirror
programme.desc: S1 E12 — Ferrari 550 MaranelloThe highlights from all eras of automobile history: for example, when Stirling Moss won the "Mille Miglia" in record time. Contemporary witnesses report on their experiences. In 1997 Ferrari celebrated the company's 50th birthday.

programme.title: Tuning - it doesn't get any lower!
programme.desc: S2 E14 — Cult SocietyTuning is a way of life for many car fans: the search for ever more horsepower, better sound and extraordinary design. The show takes a look behind the scenes of well-known, renowned and private tuning companies.

programme.title: Stunt Heroes
programme.desc: Car Action Highlights Rollovers, ramp jumps, crashes - there are 1,000 ways to destroy cars. They all know the stunt heroes. The report looks back at the highlights of the first season.

programme.title: Top Speed Classic
programme.desc: S6 E187 — Planai Classic 2025It's about fast cars and the most famous racing and rally tracks. The moderator Martin Utberg actively takes part in the most beautiful classic car events in the world. You experience the whole history of classic jewels.

programme.title: Super Cars
programme.desc: S16 E231 — Luxury and LifestyleEnglish luxury and German lifestyle. With an extended wheelbase, the Bentley Bentayga focuses on its rear passengers and pampers them with flawless workmanship and a champagne cooler.

programme.title: Road Wars Staffel 6
programme.desc: S6 E17No matter whether it's about drug-related crime, house searches and chases: the series follows a special unit of the British police. Together with the dog team, they declare war on the thieves in the Thames Valley.

programme.title: NZ Jetsprint Championship 2025
programme.desc: The New Zealand Jetsprint Championship is the most important sprint boat competition from New Zealand, the country where the sport was founded in 1981. Jetsprinting is comparable to rally sports, but there is only one boat on the track at any given time and boats drive at very high speeds. The up to 500 HP strong jet sprint boats therefore try to achieve the best time on the tracks.

programme.title: Car History
programme.desc: S1 E31 — Car Advertising Part 2In the seventies and eighties, automobile advertising boomed, fueled by car production. The spots are becoming more and more imaginative and entertaining, but also more and more expensive to produce.

programme.title: Top Speed Classic
programme.desc: S6 E255 — Episode 262It's about fast cars and the most famous racing and rally tracks. The moderator Martin Utberg actively takes part in the most beautiful classic car events in the world. You experience the whole history of classic jewels.

programme.title: Car History
programme.desc: S2 E24 — Mercedes - Motorsport HistoryThe episode is about the successes of Mercedes. The brand has been making history for 120 years.

programme.title: Classic
programme.desc: Episode 36The show is about classic cars and everything that goes with them: events, racing, portraits, mechanic tips and the most beautiful pictures from the automobile archives from all over the world. Cars from bygone eras are also on display.

programme.title: Rear view mirror
programme.desc: S2 E19 — Audi QuattroFour driven wheels are better than two. This was once established. The Quattro drive is now almost 30 years old. Rearview mirror presents Audi and the Quattro drive. An innovative and very successful story.

programme.title: Racing Files
programme.desc: S1 E2 — The Monaco Grand PrixThe Monaco Grand Prix has achieved cult status since its premiere in 1929. No race is as intertwined with racing history as the Monaco Grand Prix. The story of this legendary race is told.

programme.title: Classic Races
programme.desc: Quattro - Victory of an IdeaThis issue of "Classic Races" shows what is probably the best description and presentation of the four-wheel drive system newly developed by Audi from 1980 onwards. With fascinating and exciting pictures from various rallies and rides.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Teleshopping for e.g. cosmetics, jewelry, fashion or household appliances. The consumer is offered the opportunity to select a product of their choice on television and order it from a retailer by telephone, fax, online shop or email.
