programme.desc: Good Ranchers 250: RennenVon dem Phoenix Raceway in Avondale, Arizona, USA.

programme.title: Motorcycles
programme.desc: S1 E7 — Carbon BikesThe question is examined whether carbon fiber makes sense on motorcycles. : The fabric structure of the magical material carbon from Formula 1 shimmers with high quality. It is expensive, but ultra-stable and ultra-light and therefore very attractive.

programme.title: Mission Mobility
programme.desc: S3 E31 — Episode 31Fascination Australia. Red deserts, mystical sounds and endless expanses. Traveling through the outback by car has always been the dream of 25-year-old student Lena Kwasow.

programme.title: NTT Indycar Series 2026
programme.desc: Chevrolet Detroit GP, Streets of DetroitVom The Raceway at Belle Isle Park in Detroit, Michigan, USA.

programme.title: Made in....
programme.desc: S2 E4 — MaybachMaybach is one of the finest car manufacturers in Germany. Each model is made entirely by hand. It is an outstanding vehicle, the absolute pinnacle of driving comfort, timeless aesthetics and workmanship.

programme.title: Green wave
programme.desc: E12 — The battery of the future A newly developed battery promises to revolutionize electromobility. Work is underway to ensure that cars do not require any fuel at all and that they can drive independently, that is, steer and react independently.

programme.title: Dream Cars
programme.desc: S2 E14 — EnglandThe most exciting, beautiful and fastest dream cars from Great Britain are shown. Whether luxury sedan, coupe or super sports car, cars from England combine tradition with exclusive luxury, exceptional performance and British flair.

programme.title: Crash
programme.desc: S2 E32 — Episode 32We see what happens when ambition exceeds driving ability and racing professionals are carried out of the curve. Breathtaking stunts by professional drivers and spectacular scenes in which no one is harmed are presented.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.desc: S2 E19 — The sporting legacy of Henry Ford Henry Ford would have been 150 years old in 2013. The show looks at three models that can be described as an important part of its sporting heritage: Ford Thunderbird (1955), Ford Mustang (1964) and Ford Capri (1968).

programme.title: Cars + Life
programme.desc: E5 — Episode 5With high-quality vehicles and a focus on hybrid and electric drives, Volvo offshoot Polestar is developing into a serious competitor to Tesla. Hyundai is also taking another, more sustainable path with the Nexo.

programme.title: Car History
programme.desc: S2 E28 — Ford Motorsport - Racing ClassicsFor more than 100 years, Ford has been linked to motorsport and has always won many races. Ford has already celebrated victories with the GT40 at Le Mans, the Capri on the circuit and the Escort at the Monte-Carlo Rally and the Safari Rally.

programme.title: Nordschleife
programme.desc: S1 E7 — Tourists in the Green Hell 7The show shows fast-paced motorsport scenes from dragster races with a large audience.

programme.title: On Tour
programme.desc: Snow MobileThe Snow Mobile Grand Prix in Saalbach-Hinterglemm is accompanied by the winter opening of the Alps.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: S1 E18 — Off the RoadA bit of madness is part of it when off-road enthusiasts drive 800-horsepower monsters to perform breakneck maneuvers in the toughest off-road trophies. The show finds some of the best top off-roaders off the road.

programme.title: Rear view mirror

programme.title: The Bush Years: Family. Duty...
programme.desc: ...Power: Sibling Rivalry: Brothers George W. and Jeb Bush were determined to make the governor's mansion, but only one succeeded. (Part 5 of 6) (S)

programme.title: The Bush Years: Family. Duty...
programme.desc: ...Power: President George W. Bush strived to secure the second term his father never won. But the war he started in Iraq will cast a long shadow on the family. (Part 6 of 6) (S)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's England
programme.desc: Agatha Christie's England explores the real-life magical places which inspired her stories, from the sleepy seaside chocolate box villages she lived in as a child to the luxury hotels. (S)

programme.title: Agatha Christie: 100 Years of...
programme.desc: ...Poirot and Miss Marple: A celebratory programme exploring Agatha Christie's ten most iconic works. (S)

programme.title: Armstrong
programme.desc: Armstrong tells the definitive life story of Neil Armstrong - from his childhood in rural Ohio, through aerial combat in Korea, to his first steps on the Moon. (S)

programme.title: Weathered: Earth's Extremes
programme.desc: Water Whiplash: Maiya May learns about the severe impacts of droughts and floods on agriculture and the alarming depletion of groundwater reserves. (Part 4 of 6) (Ep4)
